item.title: Welcome In
item.description: Hey there, welcome to my first blog post! Who Am I? My name is Andre and I am Software Engineer in Seattle. I am currently working at Expedia Group.
item.content:
Hey there, welcome to my first blog post!

Who Am I?

My name is Andre and I am Software Engineer in Seattle. I am currently working at Expedia Group.
